name: Stripe
shortDescription: Complete payment processing integration with Stripe API for handling payments, subscriptions, customers, and financial operations. Supports comprehensive payment workflows, webhook handling, and full CRUD operations for all major Stripe objects.

actions.name: Get Balance
actions.description: Retrieves the current account balance

actions.name: Get Connected accounts
actions.description: Get a list of all connected accounts

actions.name: Create Customer
actions.description: Creates a new customer.

actions.name: Update Customer
actions.description: Updates the specified customer by setting the values of the parameters passed. Most parameters can be changed, including `default_source`, `email`, and `payment_method`.

actions.name: Get Customer
actions.description: Retrieves the details of an existing customer. You need to supply the unique customer ID from either a customer creation request or the Stripe dashboard.

actions.name: Get Customers List
actions.description: Returns a list of your customers. The customers are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recent customers appearing first.

actions.name: Delete Customer
actions.description: Permanently deletes a customer. It cannot be undone. Also immediately cancels any active subscriptions on the customer.

actions.name: Create Payment Intent
actions.description: Creates a Payment Intent, which is an object representing your intent to collect payment from a customer.

actions.name: Get Payment Intent
actions.description: Retrieves a Payment Intent by its ID.

actions.name: Confirm Payment Intent
actions.description: Confirms a Payment Intent, indicating that the customer intends to pay with a specific payment method.

actions.name: Cancel Payment Intent
actions.description: Cancels a Payment Intent, if it is in a state that allows cancellation.

actions.name: Get Payment Intents List
actions.description: Lists all Payment Intents. You can provide various options to filter the list.

actions.name: Create Subscription
actions.description: Creates a new subscription on an existing customer.

actions.name: Get Subscription
actions.description: Retrieves the subscription with the given ID.

actions.name: Update Subscription
actions.description: Updates the specified subscription.

actions.name: Cancel Subscription
actions.description: Cancels a subscription and, by default, immediately finalizes the current period and sends a final invoice. Optional prorate behavior can be set.

actions.name: Get Subscriptions List
actions.description: Lists all subscriptions. You can provide various options to filter the list, such as filtering by customer or subscription status.

actions.name: Create Product
actions.description: Creates a new product object, which can then be used in subscriptions or as part of the Stripe checkout process.

actions.name: Get Product
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific product by its ID.

actions.name: Update Product
actions.description: Updates the details of an existing product by its ID.

actions.name: Delete Product
actions.description: Deletes a product. Deleting a product also deletes its associated prices.

actions.name: Get Products List
actions.description: Lists all products. You can provide options to filter the list, such as by `active` status or `limit`.

actions.name: Create Price
actions.description: Creates a new price object. A price is used to define a recurring or one-time charge for a product.

actions.name: Get Price
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific price by its ID.

actions.name: Update Price
actions.description: Updates the details of an existing price.

actions.name: Get Prices List
actions.description: Lists all prices, optionally filtered by parameters such as `active` status or `product`.

actions.name: Create Payment Link
actions.description: Creates a new Payment Link object, allowing you to generate shareable URLs to collect payment.

actions.name: Deactivate Payment Link
actions.description: Deactivate a Payment Link

actions.name: Update Payment Link
actions.description: Updates an existing Payment Link, including its status(deactivating).

actions.name: Get Payment Link
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific Payment Link by its ID.

actions.name: Get Payment Links List
actions.description: Lists all Payment Links. You can filter the results using various parameters, such as `limit`.

actions.name: Get Payment Link Line Items
actions.description: Retrieves line items of a specific Payment Link.

actions.name: Create Transfer
actions.description: Creates a transfer to move funds between accounts.

actions.name: Update Transfer
actions.description: Updates the specified transfer by setting the values of the parameters passed.

actions.name: Get Transfer
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific transfer by its ID.

actions.name: Get Transfers List
actions.description: Lists all transfers, with optional filters such as `created`, `limit`, or `starting_after`.

actions.name: Create Refund
actions.description: Creates a refund for a previously created charge or payment intent.

actions.name: Update Refund
actions.description: Updates the specified refund by setting the values of the parameters passed.

actions.name: Retrieve Refund
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific refund by its ID.

actions.name: Get Refunds List
actions.description: Lists all refunds, with optional filters such as `charge`, `payment_intent`, or `limit`.

actions.name: Cancel Refund
actions.description: Cancels a refund if it has not yet been submitted to the bank or card network.

actions.name: Create Invoice
actions.description: Creates a new invoice for a customer.

actions.name: Update Invoice
actions.description: Updates an existing invoice by its ID.

actions.name: Get Invoice
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific invoice by its ID.

actions.name: Get Invoices List
actions.description: Lists all invoices, with optional filters such as `customer`, `limit`, or `starting_after`.

actions.name: Finalize Invoice
actions.description: Finalizes the invoice, which locks it for any further changes and attempts to charge the customer.

actions.name: Send Invoice
actions.description: Sends the invoice.

actions.name: Void Invoice
actions.description: Mark a finalized invoice as void. This cannot be undone. Voiding an invoice is similar to deletion, however it only applies to finalized invoices and maintains a papertrail where the invoice can still be found.

actions.name: Mark Invoice as Uncollectible
actions.description: Marking an invoice as uncollectible is useful for keeping track of bad debts that can be written off for accounting purposes.

actions.name: Pay Invoice
actions.description: Stripe automatically creates and then attempts to collect payment on invoices for customers on subscriptions according to your subscriptions settings. However, if you’d like to attempt payment on an invoice out of the normal collection schedule or for some other reason, you can do so.

actions.name: Create Payout
actions.description: Creates a new payout to your bank account or debit card.

actions.name: Update Payout
actions.description: Updates the specified payout by setting the values of the parameters passed.

actions.name: Get Payout
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific payout by its ID.

actions.name: Get Payouts List
actions.description: Lists all payouts, with optional filters such as `created`, `destination`, or `status`.

actions.name: Cancel Payout
actions.description: You can cancel a previously created payout if its status is pending. Stripe refunds the funds to your available balance. You can’t cancel automatic Stripe payouts.

actions.name: Create Checkout Session
actions.description: Creates a new Checkout Session object, allowing customers to make a payment through Stripe's hosted checkout page.

actions.name: Get Checkout Session
actions.description: Retrieves an existing Checkout Session by its ID.

actions.name: Get Checkout Sessions List
actions.description: Lists all Checkout Sessions, with optional filters such as `customer` or `limit`.

actions.name: Update Checkout Session
actions.description: Updates a Checkout Session, allowing modifications to certain properties such as `metadata` and `payment_method_options`.

actions.name: Expire Checkout Session
actions.description: Expires a Checkout Session, preventing any further interactions or payments.

actions.name: Create Webhook Endpoint
actions.description: Creates a new Webhook Endpoint object to receive events from Stripe.

actions.name: Get Webhook Endpoint
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a specific Webhook Endpoint by its ID.

actions.name: Update Webhook Endpoint
actions.description: Updates an existing Webhook Endpoint, including changes to its `url` or `enabled_events`.

actions.name: Get Webhook Endpoints List
actions.description: Lists all Webhook Endpoints.

actions.name: Delete Webhook Endpoint
actions.description: Deletes a Webhook Endpoint by its ID.

actions.name: Run Custom Request
actions.description: Allows to run any of Stripe methods with attached auth credentials

triggers: Parse Webhook Event (handles all Stripe webhook events)
idealUseCases: Process online payments and handle payment intents
Manage customer subscriptions and recurring billing
Create and manage products, prices, and payment links
Manage customer data and payment methods
Process webhook events for real-time payment updates
Create checkout sessions for seamless payment experiences
